reviews.comment:
Pésimo servicio brindan. Los playeros te pueden tener fácil media hora clavado en el surtidor hasta que se acerquen a cargarte. Los "cambios de turno los hacen hora pico de movimiento" chotisima la organización. No vuelvo aunque sea la última estación de la isla con combustible.

(Translated by Google)
The service is terrible. The attendants can easily keep you stuck at the pump for half an hour before they even come to fill your tank. They schedule shift changes during peak hours—the organization is awful. I won't be back, even if it's the last station on the island with fuel.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6208441069977197261/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMwd3VxWmd3RRAB
